THORN — Parametric Lighting System

Thorn is a Red Dot Award–winning modular ceiling light designed by QZENS, constructed from two primary component types. A parametric generation framework in Blender using Geometry Nodes and Blender API is developed to operationalize this design for production.
Assembly logic into the node structure
Parametric generation in Blender using Geometry Nodes
Custom export add-on to create fabrication documentation

c4205M

Designing intelligent real-time experiences.
